name: Dayma Itamunoala
title: Senior Vice President, Sales Representative
bio: Dayma leads the Colliers Multifamily Team in Toronto. As part of the National Investment Team at Colliers, Dayma is recognized as a leading specialist in the disposition of multifamily property across Ontario. A member of the Federation of Rental-Housing Providers of Ontario (FRPO), he has personally sold over $1 billion worth of multifamily across Ontario, working with all tiers of investors including institutions, international investors, REITs, developers, and private capital.

name: Aman Rana
title: Associate Vice President, Seniors Housing
bio: With over a decade of experience on the debt side of commercial real estate, Aman has built a thorough understanding of the seniors housing and multifamily asset class through his time at BMO and Timbercreek Capital. His experience underwriting complex transactions across Canada and the U.S. brings a capital markets lens to an asset class where structure matters as much as pricing.

name: Zoe Prachter
title: Transaction Manager, Sales Representative
bio: Zoe is the Transaction Manager for the Colliers Multifamily Investment Team in Toronto, where she plays a pivotal role in facilitating the acquisition and disposition of multifamily real estate properties. She oversees marketing initiatives, client engagement strategy, and strengthens brand awareness. A licensed Sales Representative with RECO, Zoe actively participates in property tours and negotiations.

name: Yianni Tsiampas
title: Sales Representative
bio: Yianni works alongside Dayma Itamunoala as a key member of the Colliers Multifamily Team, contributing to the team's continued success in the disposition of multifamily properties across Ontario. He specializes in building strong relationships with a diverse range of purchasers and investors, ensuring each deal is executed with precision and attention to detail.

name: Chris Bertucci
title: Sales Representative
bio: Chris works alongside Dayma Itamunoala as a key member of the Colliers Multifamily Team, contributing to the team's success in the disposition of multifamily properties across Ontario. He excels at cultivating strong relationships with a wide variety of buyers and investors, ensuring every transaction is handled with care and precision.
